seoTitle: West Mackay vs West Prairie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Mackay and West Prairie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Mackay vs West Prairie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Mackay and West Prairie.
heading: West Mackay vs West Prairie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Mackay, Queensland and West Prairie, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Mackay has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to West Prairie (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Mackay or West Prairie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Mackay has a flood risk score of 52/100, while West Prairie scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Mackay scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. West Prairie scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Mackay or West Prairie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Mackay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
